{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the Twisting Abyss
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Path of the Twisting Abyss]] contains scales of death and shadow.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
